# default

**Type Property**

The shared singleton Smart Card reader slot manager.

## Declaration

```swift
class var `default`: TKSmartCardSlotManager? { get }
```

## Discussion

This method returns `nil` unless the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/BundleResources/Entitlements/com.apple.security.smartcard] entitlement is enabled.
